message:
feat(error): domain-specific error model with graceful degradation (bd-1q5.19)

Introduces TerminalError, RenderError, LayoutError, WidgetError, and
ProtocolError with a unified Error enum. Each variant maps to a
DegradationAction (fallback render, reuse layout, error placeholder,
skip frame, drop input, shutdown) so the runtime can recover without
panicking. 47 tests in error module + 7 updated lib tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
